title: Schema-Version Registry
description: JSON Schema for skills/wiki-migration/schemas.json (per ADR-027). Validates the canonical page-type registry the framework uses to compute schema drift in /sf:doctor and migration chains in /sf:update.

^_.description: Underscore-prefixed keys are free-form maintainer notes; ignored by tooling. Used for `_comment`, `_path_pattern_note`, etc.

_comment.description: Free-form note for maintainers; ignored by tooling.

framework_version.description: The framework version this registry snapshot belongs to. Matches plugin.json#version.

page_types.description: Map of page-type identifier → schema metadata. Keys are kebab-case identifiers used in each page's YAML frontmatter `type:` field.

current.description: The current schema version. Bumped when a migration ships for this page type.

supported_from.description: The lowest schema version still auto-migrate-able. Pages below this become read-only (N+3 deprecation window per ADR-027).

deprecated_below.description: If non-null, schemas strictly below this number are deprecated (one bump away from read-only). Use to give friends an early warning before the N+3 cliff.

path_pattern.description: Glob-style path within a friend's wiki where pages of this type live. <name>, <handle>, <topic>, <slug>, <NNN> are placeholders.

owner_module.description: Which build-team module owns the writer/template for this page type. 'universal' means friend-authored with no single owning module.

adr_refs.description: ADR identifiers that define this page type's shape.

items.description: Migration directory basename (e.g. '1-to-2'). Each must exist as skills/wiki-migration/migrations/<page-type>-<basename>/.

migrations.description: Ordered list of available migrations for this page type. /sf:update composes the chain from these. Element N takes schema N → N+1.
